'Dhurandhar : The Revenge': Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 250 crore global mark
description: The Indian box office is witnessing a historic moment as Aditya Dhar and Ranveer Singh’s 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has already surged to a cumulative domestic net of Rs. 165.36 crore by Friday afternoon. Despite an ‘A’ rating and a massive 3-hour 49-minute runtime, the film is on track to cross the Rs. 230 crore global gross mark by the end of Day 2.

title: Iran's F-35 'hit' shakes the myth of US 'sky ghost' - why it could be turning point
description: A US F-35 stealth fighter jet sustained damage during a mission over Iran. The aircraft made an emergency landing safely. Iran claims its air defence systems hit the advanced jet. This incident is under investigation. The F-35 is a highly advanced stealth aircraft. This event could signal improvements in Iran's defence capabilities.

title: What’s going on between Luka Dončić and Anamaria Goltes? Custody battle explained
description: NBA star Luka Dončić and partner Anamaria Goltes are embroiled in a complex international custody battle for their two daughters, born in the US and Slovenia. The split, reportedly due to Dončić's limited time with his children during the NBA season, has led to legal filings in both California and Slovenia. Courts are now determining jurisdiction in this high-profile dispute.

title: Eid-ul-Fitr: Wishes, messages, quotes, greetings & images for sharing
description: Eid-ul-Fitr has arrived, marking the end of Ramadan with joyous celebrations.  This guide offers a collection of heartfelt, fun, and spiritual messages to share with loved ones via WhatsApp and social media.

title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink says AI is leading to a crisis and it is not mass layoffs
description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink warns that current college graduates may face high unemployment due to rapid AI adoption disrupting entry-level white-collar jobs.  He highlights a societal lag in adapting to technological change, while also noting AI's creation of new opportunities in skilled trades, for which society is unprepared.

title: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas says Google Search 'still better job than anyone else'
description: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas revealed his company's Comet browser on iOS defaults to Google Search for everyday queries, acknowledging Google's superiority in navigational searches. This pragmatic approach positions Comet as a complementary tool, blending Google's speed with Perplexity's advanced AI capabilities for more complex needs.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
description: Meta is ending its virtual reality social network Horizon Worlds on Quest headsets. The app will be removed from the Quest store by March 2026 and fully discontinued on VR devices by June 2026. Horizon Worlds will then operate solely as a mobile application.
